name: svingbue-app
description: Flightglass native packaging scaffold — Capacitor wrapper around the static web app for iOS/TestFlight builds via Codemagic.

scripts.test:academy-foundation: node --test --test-concurrency=1 scripts/academy-curriculum.test.mjs scripts/academy-store.test.mjs scripts/academy-router.test.mjs scripts/academy-recommendation.test.mjs scripts/academy-home-view-model.test.mjs scripts/academy-experience-host.test.mjs scripts/academy-voice-manifest.test.mjs scripts/academy-voice.test.mjs scripts/academy-voice-sync.test.mjs scripts/academy-voice-ui.test.mjs scripts/academy-voice-reference-cues.test.mjs scripts/academy-voice-pack.test.mjs scripts/academy-start-line-model.test.mjs scripts/academy-start-line-content.test.mjs
scripts.test:academy-voice: node --test --test-concurrency=1 scripts/academy-voice-manifest.test.mjs scripts/academy-voice.test.mjs scripts/academy-voice-sync.test.mjs scripts/academy-voice-ui.test.mjs scripts/academy-voice-reference-cues.test.mjs scripts/academy-voice-pack.test.mjs
scripts.test:academy: npm run test:academy-foundation && node --test --test-concurrency=1 scripts/academy-backspin-model.test.mjs scripts/academy-lesson-journey.test.mjs scripts/academy-home-browser.test.mjs scripts/academy-backspin-browser.test.mjs scripts/academy-start-line-browser.test.mjs
scripts.test:ux: node --test --test-concurrency=1 scripts/evidence-lock.test.mjs scripts/flightglass-ux.test.mjs scripts/home-night-ladder.test.mjs scripts/academy-backspin-model.test.mjs scripts/academy-lesson-journey.test.mjs scripts/academy-home-browser.test.mjs scripts/academy-backspin-browser.test.mjs scripts/academy-start-line-browser.test.mjs && npm run test:academy-foundation && npm run test:webkit
scripts.claude:ready: npm run brand:verify && npm run test:ux && node scripts/verify-claude-autopilot.mjs
